scripts.package:android: bun run build && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.package:android:debug: bun run build && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.package:android:bundle: bun run build && cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.package:ios: bun run build && cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -archivePath build/App.xcarchive archive
